As part of National Start-Up Day, the Centre for Entrepreneurship & Innovation (CEI), in collaboration with the Student Entrepreneurship Cell (E-Cell) hosted an engaging innovation talk by Mr S. Devarajan.

In this session, Mr Devarajan shares the inside story of Tata Elxsi’s remarkable turnaround, framed as “startup 2.0”, a journey of survival, reinvention, and strategic transformation.

Drawing on leadership experience across Tata Elxsi, Cisco Systems, and global technology boards, the session reflects on building global leadership in design, engineering, and digital innovation, including electric vehicle solutions, embedded systems, and media technologies.

A valuable watch for students, entrepreneurs, and professionals interested in innovation-led growth, strategic repositioning, and long-term value creation.

Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cU3JvnTxwx4

#IIMCalcutta #CEI #NationalStartupDay #Innovation #Entrepreneurship #Startup #DigitalTransformation #Strategy #TataElxsi

Some places feel untouched. Almost timeless.
But spend enough time here, and you start noticing the shifts.
Winters arriving late. Snow melting sooner.
Routes that once felt familiar, now demanding more respect.
We still go. We still explore.
But the mindset is changing.
Because what lies ahead isn’t just about capability anymore,
it’s about awareness.

caption:
Everyone wants the growth hack. Airbnb's secret was the opposite, doing things so manual and personal that no playbook could replicate it. That personal obsession is what turned 100 users into 1,000 and eventually 100 million. Which founder do you think actually does this kind of thing today?

#startupstory #airbnb #founderstories #startupgrowth #entrepreneurship #growthhacking #techstartup #foundermindset #startuplife #buildinpublic #ycombinator #startuptips #businessgrowth #earlyusers #startuplessons #productmarket #hustle #techfounder #0to1000 #startupadvice

In 2009 Airbnb was making $200 a week and couldn't figure out why. Paul Graham told them to go to New York, meet their hosts, and take better photos. They rented a camera, did it themselves, and weekly revenue doubled almost immediately. The product wasn't broken. The trust was.

#startups #airbnb #startuplessons #growthhacking #founderadvice #productmarket #techstartups #startupgrowth #entrepreneurship #buildingastartup #paulgraham #ycombinator #growthmindset #startuptips #businessgrowth #earlystagestartup #founders #techbusiness #startuplife #businesslessons
The thing about Y Combinator that's cool is that most companies won't happen if we don't fund them. - Sam Altman #AI #Motivation #Entrepreneurship #YCombinator #YCstartups #MakeItHappen #PlayToWin

Many of the best YC companies have had phenomenally small number of employees for their first year, sometimes none besides the founders. - Sam Altman #AI #Motivation #Entrepreneurship #YCombinator #YCstartups #BuildYourTeam #BuildDifferent

Featured Impact Project: StudyDojo – The AI Study Tool Students Actually Love.

StudyDojo is a Y Combinator-backed edtech startup (W25 batch) transforming question banks, flashcards, and mini-lessons into personalized AI learning experiences that adapt to each student's specific curriculum. Instead of just marking answers right or wrong, students receive step-by-step AI feedback that builds genuine understanding—not just memorization. With an exceptional NPS of 75+, 140,000+ community members, and 13% weekly growth, StudyDojo is becoming the browser tab students never close.

How it works:
📚 Students practice with curriculum-aligned questions and mini-lessons.
🤖 AI provides step-by-step feedback—not just correct answers.
🧠 Smart flashcards adjust based on mastery, focusing on weak areas.
🔍 Students can "go deeper" with any question for additional explanations.

Key impacts:
📈 140,000+ community members across 180 countries and 2,400 schools.
💳 2,000+ paying customers generating mid-six-figure ARR.
📊 13% weekly growth (most recent two weeks); 10% sustained since joining YC.
🌟 75+ NPS—exceptionally high for any consumer product.

Scale:
🚀 Y Combinator W25 batch; strong B2C adoption driving organic B2B school interest; built for student experience first—branding, UI/UX, and curriculum-tailored AI.

Why it matters:
One in four people are students—each learning differently, yet education remains one-size-fits-all. StudyDojo proves that AI can finally deliver personalized learning at scale, with students adopting it because they actually love using it.

Practice. Understand. Master.
https://www.StudyDojo.com

#StudyDojo #EdTech #AI #PersonalizedLearning #YCombinator #K12Education #StudentSuccess #AITutoring #FutureOfLearning #StudySmarter #AvantImpactStories #AvantLabs

Claude Code của bạn đang làm việc MỘT MÌNH.

Không review. Không QA. Không ai challenge.
Ship thẳng lên production rồi cầu nguyện.

Garry Tan — CEO Y Combinator — fix chuyện đó bằng gstack:

✅ 6 agent AI chạy song song: architect, reviewer, QA, security
✅ Clone + chạy trong 2 phút — MIT license, miễn phí
✅ /autoplan ra roadmap → /review check code → /qa test browser thật → /ship deploy
✅ 1 founder, 10K dòng code/ngày — output bằng team 20 người

Không phải tool mới.
Là cách biến Claude Code từ junior dev thành engineering team.

📌 Save bài này. Clone về thử cuối tuần.
➜ github.com/garry/gstack

—
[GIẢI MÃ]·AI·VN
AI không phức tạp. Chỉ cần đọc đúng thứ.
